title: Light Progressive Disclosure Foundation — load_skill Tool
author: abhiswami2121@gmail.com

summary.goal: Build load_skill tool + tiny system prompt header as U2 progressive disclosure foundation without locking architecture
summary.outcome: load_skill tool built and registered in inline tools + static manifest. Tiny prefix added to system prompt. TypeScript typecheck passed. pnpm build passed. Vercel deploy READY. /api/tools confirms loadSkill in list (HTTP 200).

load_skill_tool.description: Load detailed skill content on-demand from the VPS file system bridge. Resolves skill paths across multiple categories.
load_skill_tool.bridge: Uses VPS FS bridge (secrets.vps.fsBridgeUrl). Falls back to skill listing on miss.

registration.inline_tools: Added to inlineTools object in lib/agent/inline-tools.ts under Knowledge category
registration.static_manifest: Added to app/api/tools/route.ts hardcoded tool list
registration.chat_route: Included via getAvailableTools() spread in app/(chat)/api/chat/route.ts
registration.available_when: VPS_FS_BRIDGE_URL is configured (i.e., VPS FS bridge reachable)

system_prompt_update.added: You have access to load_skill tool for on-demand skill loading. Available skill categories: connectors/, capabilities/, organizations/<org>/<domain>/. Use this to keep context efficient — load detailed connector or playbook details only when you need them.
system_prompt_update.location: In regularPrompt, after the selfCode description and before context section
system_prompt_update.intact: Existing dynamic connector registry (buildConnectorCatalogPrompt) NOT removed — U2 will rearchitect

curl_evidence.verdict: PASS — loadSkill appears in static tools manifest at position 5 (knowledge category)

architecture_alignment.pattern_a_readiness: load_skill is the first gatekeeper tool for Pattern A (Documentation-Driven Runtime)
architecture_alignment.what_this_enables: U2 can now use load_skill to read individual skill files on-demand instead of preloading 400+ tools. The file system is the extended brain.
architecture_alignment.what_is_NOT_done: Remaining 4 gatekeeper tools (view_file, execute_skill, list_playbooks, self_code, spawn_v2). Full tool array consolidation. Dynamic registry removal.
architecture_alignment.next_step: UF3 synthesis + U2 architecture pivot recommendation document
